overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city at night. The vehicle travels through covered underpasses, elevated highways, and sleek tunnels with dynamic cyberpunk lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with orange concrete walls

agents.ego_description: driving through covered underpass with orange walls, graffiti, and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving in opposite direction through the underpass

entered.detail: tall orange concrete retaining walls lining both sides of the underpass
red painted lines marking the edges of the driving lanes
illuminated advertising screens mounted on the tunnel walls
industrial lighting fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling
colorful graffiti tags spray-painted on the concrete walls

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a covered urban underpass with distinctive orange concrete walls and red lane markings. Digital billboards and graffiti adorn the walls while overhead lights illuminate the wet asphalt road. A yellow sports car passes in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city intersection with commercial buildings and neon signage

events.description: exits covered underpass into open city street with visible sky and neon signs
navigates through intersection with crosswalks and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: navigating city streets and intersections in heavy rain, passing pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on sidewalk near commercial building entrance

entered.detail: tall commercial buildings with illuminated windows and signage
bright neon signs advertising various businesses and products
tall street lamps casting light on the wet road surface
zebra crossing markings on the asphalt for pedestrian traffic

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens into a rain-soaked city street lined with commercial high-rises and glowing neon signs. The vehicle navigates through intersections with crosswalks while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. Street lamps reflect off the wet asphalt, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with concrete barriers and fog

events.description: transitions from city streets to elevated highway with concrete barriers
begins to slow and approach highway exit ramp

agents.ego_description: cruising on elevated highway through heavy fog and rain with reduced visibility

entered.detail: tall concrete barriers lining both sides of the elevated highway
street lamps mounted on tall poles along the highway median
road signs indicating directions and exits mounted overhead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions onto an elevated highway flanked by concrete safety barriers. Fog and heavy rain reduce visibility while overhead lights illuminate the multi-lane road. The environment is devoid of pedestrians and other vehicles as the car approaches an exit ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown intersection with modern corporate buildings

events.description: exits highway ramp into downtown area with DYNALIFE building visible
makes right turn at intersection with crosswalks and bollards

agents.ego_description: navigating downtown streets, turning at intersections near the DYNALIFE corporate building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking on sidewalk near building entrance

entered.detail: large modern building with prominent DYNALIFE signage on the facade
contemporary buildings with reflective glass exteriors
bollards, trash cans, and street fixtures along the sidewalks

segments.scene_description: Descending from the highway, the vehicle enters a downtown district featuring the prominent DYNALIFE corporate building and modern glass architecture. The car navigates through intersections with crosswalks and bollards while pedestrians walk along the rain-slicked sidewalks. Neon signs illuminate the wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic covered tunnel with teal accent lighting

events.description: enters modern covered tunnel with futuristic architecture
ambient lighting shifts to teal and cyan tones with linear light strips

agents.ego_description: driving through sleek futuristic tunnel with cyan lighting strips on walls

entered.detail: sleek modern tunnel walls with horizontal lines and metallic finishes
continuous teal-colored LED light strips running along the tunnel walls
ventilation systems integrated into the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a futuristic covered tunnel characterized by sleek architecture and distinctive cyan accent lighting strips. The environment is clean and modern, with ventilation grilles visible on the ceiling. The teal lighting creates a stark contrast to the warm neon of the previous streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale commercial district with palm trees and storefronts

events.description: exits futuristic tunnel into open commercial area with palm trees

agents.ego_description: cruising through upscale commercial area with palm trees and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking near storefront entrance with neon lighting

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
ground-level shops with large display windows and entrances
colorful neon signs for various businesses and restaurants

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into an upscale commercial district featuring tropical palm trees and ground-level storefronts. Neon business signs illuminate the area while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. The vehicle cruises past parked cars and modern commercial buildings with a mix of natural and artificial elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a confined urban underpass into a sprawling neon city and finally onto a desolate elevated highway. It begins beneath a covered passage with orange concrete walls and red lane markings, where digital billboards and graffiti flicker over wet asphalt as a yellow sports car speeds past. As the vehicle exits the underpass, the environment opens into a rain-soaked city street lined with glowing neon signs and commercial high-rises, navigating through intersections filled with pedestrians and reflective street lamps. The scene then shifts as the car climbs onto an elevated highway flanked by concrete barriers, where the vibrant city lights fade into a heavy rain and fog. Finally, the visibility drops and the surroundings become empty of other traffic as the vehicle approaches a lonely exit ramp.

The shot follows a continuous first-person drive from a dense corporate downtown through a sterile transit tunnel and into a lush, upscale commercial district. It begins by descending from the highway into a rain-slicked city center, navigating intersections beneath the towering glass architecture of the DYNALIFE building and vibrant neon signs. As the vehicle moves forward, the open street transitions into a sleek, covered tunnel where the warm city lights are replaced by stark cyan accent strips and industrial ventilation grilles. The scene then opens as the car exits the tunnel, shifting from the enclosed teal environment into a bright commercial area characterized by tropical palm trees and ground-level storefronts. Finally, the camera cruises past parked cars and modern buildings, blending artificial neon illumination with natural greenery under the night sky.
